Luna Notes v1.0.3

Improved release for community review.

Changes:
- Synced manifest with repository root
- Updated release assets
- Fixed version consistency
- Stability polish
releases.name: Luna Notes 1.0.3

releases.author: MaiaALex
releases.description:
First public release of Luna Notes.

Features:
- Cycle tracking
- Start / Finish period
- Current phase
- Moon phase
- PMS logic
- Ovulation window
- Luna Dashboard
- Luna Life Planner
- Cycle Calendar
- Cycle Analytics
- AI Pattern Tracker
- Phase Intelligence
- Russian / English support
- Local-first storage

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/MaiaALex/luna-notes/commits/1.0.0
releases.name: v1.0.0
